content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Dima and a Bad XOR". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1151/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains n integers a1, a2, ..., an.
content.outputFormat: Print the minimum number of operations required to make all elements of the array equal.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use XOR operation to find the minimum number of operations required to make all elements of the array equal.
